Source: Vertex AI Documentation
URL: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Vertex AI Documentation

## Key Features
- ML platform for training and deploying ML models and AI applications
- Gemini multimodal models (images, videos, text)
- Model Garden for discovering and customizing LLMs

## Training & Development
- AutoML for automated model training
- Custom training with serverless/cluster options
- Neural Architecture Search, Ray on Vertex AI
- TensorFlow and PyTorch support

## MLOps
- Vertex AI Pipelines for orchestration
- Model Registry for version management
- Feature Store for ML feature serving
- Model Monitoring and Explainable AI
- TensorBoard integration

## Security & Governance
- IAM-based access control
- Customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK)
- VPC Service Controls and Private Service Connect
- Audit logging and compliance features
- Network isolation (VPC peering, hybrid connectivity)

## Developer Tools
- Colab Enterprise
- Vertex AI Workbench
- Comprehensive Python SDK
